fields.Title: From assessment to co-build — five standard service packages
fields.Sub: We don’t sell hours; we sell "fewer prototype rounds and fewer field trips." With the EM twin and AI-Native methodology as leverage, R&D services become compounding infrastructure.
fields.PriceNote: Durations are typical; prices are indicative ranges — final pricing depends on the specific plan.

fields.Name: Pre-Design Assessment
fields.Value: Before the first PCB, see coverage and link risk on an EM twin — and save a prototype round.
fields.Persona: Consumer electronics / mission-mobile terminals at early selection
fields.Story: Representative: a terminal finds a coverage blind spot in a key band during selection and adjusts the antenna layout before mass production.

items.title: Name
items.text: Pre-Design Assessment

items.title: Value
items.text: Before the first PCB, see coverage and link risk on an EM twin — and save a prototype round.

items.text: 1–2 weeks

items.title: Price
items.text: Indicative ¥30–80k

items.title: Story
items.text: Representative: a terminal finds a coverage blind spot in a key band during selection and adjusts the antenna layout before mass production.

fields.Name: R&D Validation Sprint
fields.Value: Run one end-to-end validation on your real scenario — quantified and reproducible.
fields.Persona: R&D teams with a direction that needs fast validation
fields.Story: Representative: intermittent drops in tunnels/overpasses are root-caused to multipath blockage within a week, with fixes proposed.

items.title: Name
items.text: R&D Validation Sprint

items.title: Price

items.title: Story
items.text: Representative: intermittent drops in tunnels/overpasses are root-caused to multipath blockage within a week, with fixes proposed.

fields.Name: Full-Flow Pre-Validation
fields.Value: From channel modeling to hardware-in-the-loop — replay and regress hard-to-reproduce field issues in the lab.
fields.Persona: Projects in engineering that need repeatable regression
fields.Story: Representative: a one-off field anomaly is hardened into a replayable lab case that auto-regresses on every firmware iteration.

fields.Name: Annual Framework
fields.Value: Turn R&D services into continuous supply — scenario templates, failure-mode libraries and data assets compound year over year.
fields.Persona: Mid-to-large customers with continuous R&D cadence
fields.Story: Representative: a customer unifies EM-twin and validation across product lines under one annual framework; marginal cost falls each quarter.

fields.Title: Customization is not outsourcing — it is the highest form of the annual framework
fields.Body: We co-build joint labs, custom EM-twin platforms and scenario-specific soft basebands with leading customers. This is infrastructure-grade R&D partnership — standardized packages as the skeleton, platform and in-house hardware as leverage, templates and data assets as compounding interest. Every co-build becomes the starting line for the next customer.

This is infrastructure-grade R&D partnership — standardized packages as the skeleton, platform and in-house hardware as leverage, templates and data assets as compounding interest. Every co-build becomes the starting line for the next customer.

fields.Title: 从评估到共建，五类标准服务包
fields.Sub: 我们卖的不是工时，而是"少走几轮样机、少跑几次外场"。以电磁孪生 + AI-Native 方法论为杠杆，把研发服务做成可复利的基础设施。
fields.PriceNote: 周期为典型值，报价为指示性区间，最终以具体方案为准。

sections.heading: Package 1

fields.Name: 设计前评估包
fields.Value: 在画第一版 PCB 之前，先用电磁孪生看清覆盖与链路风险，省下一轮样机。
fields.Persona: 消费电子 / 任务型移动终端的早期选型阶段
fields.Story: 典型场景：移动终端在选型期发现关键频段的覆盖盲区，提前调整天线布局，避免量产后返工。

items.title: Name
items.text: 设计前评估包

items.title: Value
items.text: 在画第一版 PCB 之前，先用电磁孪生看清覆盖与链路风险，省下一轮样机。

items.title: Persona
items.text: 消费电子 / 任务型移动终端的早期选型阶段

items.title: Price
items.text: 指示性 ¥3–8 万

items.title: Story
items.text: 典型场景：移动终端在选型期发现关键频段的覆盖盲区，提前调整天线布局，避免量产后返工。

bullets: 覆盖 / 链路风险报告

fields.Name: 研发验证 Sprint
fields.Value: 用你的真实场景跑通一次端到端验证，拿到可量化、可复现的结果。
fields.Persona: 已有方向、需要快速验证的研发团队
fields.Story: 典型场景：车载链路在隧道与立交场景下偶发掉线，一周内定位到多径遮挡根因并给出改进项。

items.title: Name
items.text: 研发验证 Sprint

items.title: Value

items.title: Story
items.text: 典型场景：车载链路在隧道与立交场景下偶发掉线，一周内定位到多径遮挡根因并给出改进项。

fields.Name: 全流程预验证
fields.Value: 从信道建模到硬件在环，把外场难复现的问题在实验室稳定重放、回归。
fields.Persona: 进入工程化、需要可重复回归的项目
fields.Story: 典型场景：把一次性的外场异常固化成实验室可重放用例，每次固件迭代自动回归。

fields.Name: 年度框架服务
fields.Value: 把研发服务变成持续供给：场景模板、失效模式库与数据资产逐年复利。
fields.Persona: 有持续研发节奏的中大型客户
fields.Story: 典型场景：客户把多条产品线的电磁孪生与验证统一到一个年度框架下，边际成本逐季下降。

fields.Title: 定制，不是外包，而是年度框架的最高形态
fields.Body: 我们与头部客户共建联合实验室、定制电磁孪生平台与场景化软基带。这是基础设施级的研发合作——标准化服务包做骨架、平台与自研硬件做杠杆、模板与数据资产做复利。每一个共建项目，都会沉淀为下一个客户的起跑线。

items.title: Eyebrow

items.title: Title

items.text: 我们与头部客户共建联合实验室、定制电磁孪生平台与场景化软基带。这是基础设施级的研发合作——标准化服务包做骨架、平台与自研硬件做杠杆、模板与数据资产做复利。每一个共建项目，都会沉淀为下一个客户的起跑线。
